inputs.label: Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Operating frequency of the transmission line (e.g., 50/60 Hz for power lines, 1-30 MHz for RF).

businessContext_i18n.en: Operating frequency of the transmission line (e.g., 50/60 Hz for power lines, 1-30 MHz for RF).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İletim hattının çalışma frekansı (örn. güç hatları için 50/60 Hz, RF için 1-30 MHz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebsfrequenz der Übertragungsleitung (z. B. 50/60 Hz für Stromleitungen, 1-30 MHz für HF).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de fonctionnement de la ligne de transmission (ex. 50/60 Hz pour les lignes électriques, 1-30 MHz pour RF).

inputs.label: Inductance per unit length
inputs.businessContext: Inductance per unit length (H/m). Typical values: overhead lines ~1e-6 H/m, cables ~0.2e-6 H/m.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inductance per unit length (H/m). Typical values: overhead lines ~1e-6 H/m, cables ~0.2e-6 H/m.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim uzunluk başına endüktans (H/m). Tipik değerler: havai hatlar ~1e-6 H/m, kablolar ~0.2e-6 H/m.
businessContext_i18n.de: Induktivität pro Längeneinheit (H/m). Typische Werte: Freileitungen ~1e-6 H/m, Kabel ~0,2e-6 H/m.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Inductance par unité de longueur (H/m). Valeurs typiques : lignes aériennes ~1e-6 H/m, câbles ~0,2e-6 H/m.

inputs.label: Capacitance per unit length
inputs.businessContext: Capacitance per unit length (F/m). Typical values: overhead lines ~10e-12 F/m, cables ~50e-12 F/m.

businessContext_i18n.en: Capacitance per unit length (F/m). Typical values: overhead lines ~10e-12 F/m, cables ~50e-12 F/m.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim uzunluk başına kapasitans (F/m). Tipik değerler: havai hatlar ~10e-12 F/m, kablolar ~50e-12 F/m.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kapazität pro Längeneinheit (F/m). Typische Werte: Freileitungen ~10e-12 F/m, Kabel ~50e-12 F/m.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité par unité de longueur (F/m). Valeurs typiques : lignes aériennes ~10e-12 F/m, câbles ~50e-12 F/m.

inputs.label: Resistance per unit length
inputs.businessContext: Resistance per unit length (Ω/m). For lossless approximation, set to 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Resistance per unit length (Ω/m). For lossless approximation, set to 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim uzunluk başına direnç (Ω/m). Kayıpsız yaklaşım için 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Widerstand pro Längeneinheit (Ω/m). Für verlustlose Näherung auf 0 setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance par unité de longueur (Ω/m). Pour une approximation sans pertes, définir à 0.

inputs.label: Conductance per unit length
inputs.businessContext: Conductance per unit length (S/m). For lossless approximation, set to 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conductance per unit length (S/m). For lossless approximation, set to 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim uzunluk başına iletkenlik (S/m). Kayıpsız yaklaşım için 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Leitwert pro Längeneinheit (S/m). Für verlustlose Näherung auf 0 setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Conductance par unité de longueur (S/m). Pour une approximation sans pertes, définir à 0.

inputs.label: Line length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the transmission line (m).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the transmission line (m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale de la ligne de transmission (m).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
